assertions.title: Tag-based related articles

steps.action: Verify two existing articles share the same tag via DB query
steps.expected: A shared-tag dataset exists so related-article behavior can be observed
steps.observed: Tag rerun-articles-shared-1773941394 is linked to article IDs 24 and 25

steps.expected: Article detail page renders a user-visible related-articles surface
steps.observed: The route renders a 404 page with only 'Go home' and 'Sign in' links; no related-articles UI

steps.expected: A related-articles endpoint returns related results excluding the current article

assertions.issues: Blocked: no user-visible related-articles surface or related-articles API route exists in the current build, so exclusion-of-self behavior cannot be validated through the real user surface.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request export captured no requests for this flow, so status/body evidence was incomplete.
frictions.resolution: Captured supplemental curl probes with full HTTP response details in VAL-TAG-003-related-checks.txt.

blockers.description: Related-articles behavior is not exposed through a user-visible article detail surface or a testable API route in this build.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Used an existing shared-tag article pair (IDs 24/25), validated article route behavior in browser, and probed likely related endpoints; all surfaced as absent (404/no UI).

summary: VAL-TAG-003 remains blocked: shared tags exist in data, but no user-visible related-articles surface/API is currently available to validate related-results exclusion behavior.
